title: Doff Ant & Crawling Insect Killer Spray | Fast-Acting Insecticide for Ants, Fleas, Cockroaches & More | Ready-to-Use Pump Spray for Indoor & Outdoor Use | 1 Litre
features: FAST-ACTING FORMULA: The spray quickly targets and eliminates a variety of pests, providing immediate relief from infestations.
WIDE PEST CONTROL: Effectively controls ants, fleas, ticks, cockroaches, flies, mosquitoes, moths, wasps, and more, ensuring comprehensive pest management.
READY-TO-USE: The product comes in a convenient 1-litre pump-action bottle, eliminating the need for mixing or preparation.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: Versatile for both indoor hard surfaces like floors and countertops, as well as outdoor spaces like patios and gardens.
EASY APPLICATION: The pump-action spray ensures precise and controlled application, making it simple to target specific problem areas.
